text: What kind of exercise do you do regularly? Describe your routine.
hint: exercise(운동), regularly(규칙적으로), describe(설명하다), routine(일과), practice(연습), stamina(체력), team(팀)
translation: 평소 어떤 운동을 하나요? 당신의 루틴을 설명해 주세요.

text: Tell me about a sport or physical activity you enjoy and why.
hint: sport(스포츠), physical(신체적인), activity(활동), enjoy(즐기다), reason(이유), routine(일과), practice(연습), stamina(체력)
translation: 즐겨 하는 스포츠나 신체 활동에 대해 말하고, 그 이유를 설명해 주세요.

text: How has exercise changed your life or health?
hint: exercise(운동), changed(바뀐), life(생활), health(건강), routine(일과), practice(연습), stamina(체력), team(팀)
translation: 운동이 당신의 생활이나 건강을 어떻게 바꿔 주었나요?

text: You said you like watching sports. Tell me about your favorite team.
hint: watching(보기), sports(스포츠들), favorite(가장 좋아하는), team(팀), routine(일과), practice(연습), stamina(체력)
translation: 스포츠 보는 걸 좋아한다고 하셨는데요. 가장 좋아하는 팀에 대해 말해 주세요.

text: Who is your favorite sports player, and why do you like that person?
hint: favorite(가장 좋아하는), sports(스포츠들), player(플레이어), person(사람), reason(이유), routine(일과), practice(연습), stamina(체력)
translation: 가장 좋아하는 스포츠 선수는 누구인가요? 그리고 왜 좋아하나요?

text: You said you like playing soccer. How often do you play, where do you play, and who do you play with?
hint: playing(하는 중), soccer(축구), play(하다), frequency(빈도), companions(동행자들), stage(무대), tickets(티켓), audience(관객)
translation: 축구를 좋아한다고 하셨는데요. 얼마나 자주 하고, 어디에서 하고, 누구와 함께 하나요?

text: Tell me about a sports game you watched in person. What was the game like?
hint: sports(스포츠들), game(게임), watched(봤다), person(사람), teammates(팀원들), level up(레벨을 올리다), strategy(전략), game time(게임 시간)
translation: 직접 본 스포츠 경기에 대해 말해 주세요. 경기 분위기는 어땠나요?

text: How did you first learn this sport? How old were you, and who taught you?
hint: first(처음), learn(배우다), sport(스포츠), taught(가르쳐 주었다), first time(처음), routine(일과), practice(연습), stamina(체력)
translation: 이 운동을 처음 어떻게 배우게 되었나요? 몇 살 때였고, 누가 가르쳐 줬나요?

text: Tell me about your usual sports routine. When and where do you go, and what do you do from start to finish?
hint: usual(평소의), sports(스포츠들), routine(일과), start(시작하다), practice(연습), stamina(체력), team(팀)
translation: 평소 운동 루틴을 말해 주세요. 언제 어디로 가고, 시작부터 끝까지 무엇을 하나요?

text: When you go to exercise, what do you prepare? Where do you go, and who do you go with?
hint: exercise(운동), prepare(준비하다), routine(일과), practice(연습), stamina(체력), team(팀)
translation: 운동하러 갈 때 무엇을 준비하나요? 어디로 가고, 누구와 함께 가나요?

text: Tell me about the last time you played a sport. When was it, and who were you with?
hint: last(지난), time(시간), played(했다), sport(스포츠), last time(지난번), companions(동행자들), routine(일과), practice(연습)
translation: 마지막으로 운동한 때에 대해 말해 주세요. 언제였고, 누구와 함께 했나요?

text: How did you feel after your last workout? Was it easy or hard for you?
hint: feel(느끼다), after(이후에), last(지난), workout(운동), last time(지난번), routine(일과), practice(연습), stamina(체력)
translation: 최근 운동하고 나서 기분이 어땠나요? 당신에게 쉬웠나요, 어려웠나요?
